Compute the primary decomposition and saturation of the Hessian rank-2 locus for cubics in Sylvester's pentahedral form x_4 = -(x_0+x_1+x_2+x_3), f = sum l_i * x_i^3, in the ring K[x_0..x_3, l_0..l_4, z-variables], saturating with respect to the product of all l_i coefficients.

K = QQ
R = K[x_0..x_3, l_0..l_4, z00,z01,z02,z03,z11,z12,z13,z22,z23,z33]
X = {x_0,x_1,x_2,x_3}
A = genericSymmetricMatrix(R, z00, 4)
I2 = minors(3, A)
hessRank2 = f ->(
    hess := diff(transpose matrix{X}, diff(matrix{X}, f));
    I := eliminate(X, ideal(flatten entries (A-hess)));
    I + I2
)
x_4 := -sum(4, i->(x_i))
f = sum(5, i->(l_i*x_i^3))
J = hessRank2(f)
Jsat = saturate(J, ideal product(5, i->l_i))
primaryDecomposition(Jsat)
